item.author: QA
item.body: feito: revalidei no live `harden-workflow-publish-gates`; os estados operacionais agora aparecem no payload/UI e o handoff DEV→QA não fica mais preso por upstream guard. bloqueio: a promoção QA→Alan homologation segue bloqueada de forma explícita pelo publish guard do gate posterior (HTTP 409 `upstream_guard_blocked`), então o card permanece em QA neste turno. próximo passo: DEV/owner publicar/reconciliar as mudanças relevantes e repetir a promoção para Alan homologation. Evidências: board/drawer http://72.60.150.140:5173/qa-artifacts/playwright/harden-workflow-publish-gates-live/02-board-live.png | http://72.60.150.140:5173/qa-artifacts/playwright/harden-workflow-publish-gates-live/03-drawer-live.png | payload/UI http://72.60.150.140:5173/qa-artifacts/playwright/harden-workflow-publish-gates-live/04-live-ui-payload.json | patch QA→Alan 409 http://72.60.150.140:5173/qa-artifacts/runtime/harden-workflow-publish-gates/patch-to-alan-homologation-error.json | status before http://72.60.150.140:5173/qa-artifacts/runtime/harden-workflow-publish-gates/change-before.json
